title: German Sermon 1: The Detached Soul
description: Eckhart's radical mysticism: the soul must become so empty that even God — as concept — disappears. Then the true God enters.
introduction: Eckhart's radical mysticism: the soul must become so empty that even God — as concept — disappears. Then the true God enters.

translation.text: The eye through which I see God is the same eye through which God sees me.
